data.components: V, S, M (a vial of distilled water that the spellcasters shares with a contact other plane spell you have cast since the beginning of this turn)
data.description: You attempt to establish magical contact with a creature on another plane of existence. You must know the creature's name, reputation, or title.
You set a magical alarm for yourself.

components: M (a small amount of razor-sharp material and smokeless gunpowder worth 1 gp)
data.description: A cloud of daggers appears in a 20-foot cube within range. Each creature in that area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 3d8 piercing damage from the daggers and be knocked prone.

data.components: V, S, M (a bit of chalk and salt)
V, S, M (a vial of water from the plane being banished or a drop of blood from the target)
data.description: Target must succeed on a saving throw or be exiled to another plane of existence.
